ddls:
CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the student is taking */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the academic program the student is in */,
  "year_of_study" INTEGER /* Year of study */,
  "major" TEXT /* Student's major */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor teaching the course */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the academic program the course belongs to */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester the course is offered */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Academic year the course is offered */,
  "credit_hours" INTEGER /* Credit hours of the course */,
  "prerequisites" TEXT /* Prerequisites for the course */,
  "course_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instructors" (
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instructor */,
  "instructor_name" TEXT /* Full name of the instructor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the instructor */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the instructor belongs to */,
  "academic_title" TEXT /* Academic title of the instructor */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Number of years of teaching experience */,
  "research_interests" TEXT /* Research interests of the instructor */,
  "office_location" TEXT /* Office location of the instructor */,
  "office_hours" TEXT /* Office hours of the instructor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_feedback_summary" (
  "summary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each summary entry */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating based on feedback */,
  "total_feedback_count" INTEGER /* Total number of feedback entries for the course */,
  "summary_type" TEXT /* Type of summary (e.g., mid-term, end-of-term) */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester the summary is for */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Academic year the summary is for */,
  "top_strengths" TEXT /* Top strengths of the course */,
  "top_weaknesses" TEXT /* Top weaknesses of the course */,
  "suggestions_for_improvement" TEXT /* Suggestions for improvement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("summary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_feedback_summary_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instructor_feedback_summary" (
  "summary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each summary entry */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating based on feedback */,
  "total_feedback_count" INTEGER /* Total number of feedback entries for the instructor */,
  "summary_type" TEXT /* Type of summary (e.g., mid-term, end-of-term) */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester the summary is for */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Academic year the summary is for */,
  "top_strengths" TEXT /* Top strengths of the instructor */,
  "top_weaknesses" TEXT /* Top weaknesses of the instructor */,
  "suggestions_for_improvement" TEXT /* Suggestions for improvement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("summary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instructor_feedback_summary_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id")
)
column_names: ID of the course the student is taking
ID of the academic program the student is in
ID of the instructor teaching the course
ID of the academic program the course belongs to
Academic year the course is offered
Number of years of teaching experience
